revision.text:
{{More citations needed|date=June 2024}}{{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|昌子内親王|date=November 2011}} {{Infobox royalty |name = Princess Masako
{{lang|ja|昌子内親王}} |succession = [[Empress consort of Japan]] |reign = October 9, 967 – August 1, 973 |succession1 = [[Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = 973–986 |succession2 = [[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] |reign2 = 986–1000 |consort = yes |spouse = [[Emperor Reizei]] |issue = |royal house = [[Imperial House of Japan]] |father = [[Emperor Suzaku]] |mother = Hiroko |birth_date = 950 |birth_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |death_date = {{death date and age|1000|1|10|950}} |death_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |burial_date = |burial_place = |}} {{Nihongo|'''Princess Masako '''|昌子内親王|Masako Naishinnō|950 – 10 January, 1000}}, was a princess and an [[empress of Japan]] during the [[Heian period]].{{Cite web |title=昌子内親王 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%98%8C%E5%AD%90%E5%86%85%E8%A6%AA%E7%8E%8B-21005 |access-date=2024-06-02 |website=Asahi Dictionary of Historical Japanese Figures |publisher=Asahi Shimbun Publishing Co. |language=Japanese |via=Kotobank.jp}} She was the consort of her cousin [[Emperor Reizei]] of Japan. She was the daughter of [[Emperor Suzaku]] and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Empress dowager of Japan]] | after=Fujiwara no Chikako
(granted title posthumously) | years=973–986}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Junshi]] | years=986–1000}} {{s-end}} {{Consorts of Japan}} {{Empress dowagers of Japan}} {{Grand empress dowagers of Japan}} {{authority control}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Masako, Princess}} [[Category:kk]][[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia 2]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Pages and Categories from {{More citations needed|date=June 2024}}{{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|昌子内親王|date=November 2011}} {{Infobox royalty |name = Princess Masako
{{lang|ja|昌子内親王}} |succession = [[Empress consort of Japan]] |reign = October 9, 967 – August 1, 973 |succession1 = [[Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = 973–986 |succession2 = [[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] |reign2 = 986–1000 |consort = yes |spouse = [[Emperor Reizei]] |issue = |royal house = [[Imperial House of Japan]] |father = [[Emperor Suzaku]] |mother = Hiroko |birth_date = 950 |birth_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |death_date = {{death date and age|1000|1|10|950}} |death_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |burial_date = |burial_place = |}} {{Nihongo|'''Princess Masako '''|昌子内親王|Masako Naishinnō|950 – 10 January, 1000}}, was a princess and an [[empress of Japan]] during the [[Heian period]].{{Cite web |title=昌子内親王 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%98%8C%E5%AD%90%E5%86%85%E8%A6%AA%E7%8E%8B-21005 |access-date=2024-06-02 |website=Asahi Dictionary of Historical Japanese Figures |publisher=Asahi Shimbun Publishing Co. |language=Japanese |via=Kotobank.jp}} She was the consort of her cousin [[Emperor Reizei]] of Japan. She was the daughter of [[Emperor Suzaku]] and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]

{{More citations needed|date=June 2024}}{{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|昌子内親王|date=November 2011}} {{Infobox royalty |name = Princess Masako
{{lang|ja|昌子内親王}} |succession = [[Empress consort of Japan]] |reign = October 9, 967 – August 1, 973 |succession1 = [[Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = 973–986 |succession2 = [[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] |reign2 = 986–1000 |consort = yes |spouse = [[Emperor Reizei]] |issue = |royal house = [[Imperial House of Japan]] |father = [[Emperor Suzaku]] |mother = Hiroko |birth_date = 950 |birth_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |death_date = {{death date and age|1000|1|10|950}} |death_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |burial_date = |burial_place = |}} {{Nihongo|'''Princess Masako '''|昌子内親王|Masako Naishinnō|950 – 10 January, 1000}}, was a princess and an [[empress of Japan]] during the [[Heian period]].{{Cite web |title=昌子内親王 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%98%8C%E5%AD%90%E5%86%85%E8%A6%AA%E7%8E%8B-21005 |access-date=2024-06-02 |website=Asahi Dictionary of Historical Japanese Figures |publisher=Asahi Shimbun Publishing Co. |language=Japanese |via=Kotobank.jp}} She was the consort of her cousin [[Emperor Reizei]] of Japan. She was the daughter of [[Emperor Suzaku]] and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Empress dowager of Japan]] | after=Fujiwara no Chikako
(granted title posthumously) | years=973–986}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Junshi]] | years=986–1000}} {{s-end}} {{Consorts of Japan}} {{Empress dowagers of Japan}} {{Grand empress {{lang|ja|昌子内親王}} |succession = [[Empress consort of Japan]] |reign = October 9, 967 – August 1, 973 |succession1 = [[Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = 973–986 |succession2 = [[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] |reign2 = 986–1000 |consort = yes |spouse = [[Emperor Reizei]] |issue = |royal house = [[Imperial House of Japan]] |father = [[Emperor Suzaku]] |mother = Hiroko |birth_date = 950 |birth_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |death_date = {{death date and age|1000|1|10|950}} |death_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |burial_date = |burial_place = |}} {{Nihongo|'''Princess Masako '''|昌子内親王|Masako Naishinnō|950 – 10 January, 1000}}, was a princess and an [[empress of Japan]] during the [[Heian period]].{{Cite web |title=昌子内親王 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%98%8C%E5%AD%90%E5%86%85%E8%A6%AA%E7%8E%8B-21005 |access-date=2024-06-02 |website=Asahi Dictionary of Historical Japanese Figures |publisher=Asahi Shimbun Publishing Co. |language=Japanese |via=Kotobank.jp}} She was the consort of her cousin [[Emperor Reizei]] of Japan. She was the daughter of [[Emperor Suzaku]] and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]

{{More citations needed|date=June 2024}}{{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|昌子内親王|date=November 2011}} {{Infobox royalty |name = Princess Masako
{{lang|ja|昌子内親王}} |succession = [[Empress consort of Japan]] |reign = October 9, 967 – August 1, 973 |succession1 = [[Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = 973–986 |succession2 = [[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] |reign2 = 986–1000 |consort = yes |spouse = [[Emperor Reizei]] |issue = |royal house = [[Imperial House of Japan]] |father = [[Emperor Suzaku]] |mother = Hiroko |birth_date = 950 |birth_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |death_date = {{death date and age|1000|1|10|950}} |death_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |burial_date = |burial_place = |}} {{Nihongo|'''Princess Masako '''|昌子内親王|Masako Naishinnō|950 – 10 January, 1000}}, was a princess and an [[empress of Japan]] during the [[Heian period]].{{Cite web |title=昌子内親王 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%98%8C%E5%AD%90%E5%86%85%E8%A6%AA%E7%8E%8B-21005 |access-date=2024-06-02 |website=Asahi Dictionary of Historical Japanese Figures |publisher=Asahi Shimbun Publishing Co. |language=Japanese |via=Kotobank.jp}} She was the consort of her cousin [[Emperor Reizei]] of Japan. She was the daughter of [[Emperor Suzaku]] and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]

{{More citations needed|date=June 2024}}{{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|昌子内親王|date=November 2011}} {{Infobox royalty |name = Princess Masako
{{lang|ja|昌子内親王}} |succession = [[Empress consort of Japan]] |reign = October 9, 967 – August 1, 973 |succession1 = [[Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = 973–986 |succession2 = [[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] |reign2 = 986–1000 |consort = yes |spouse = [[Emperor Reizei]] |issue = |royal house = [[Imperial House of Japan]] |father = [[Emperor Suzaku]] |mother = Hiroko |birth_date = 950 |birth_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |death_date = {{death date and age|1000|1|10|950}} |death_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |burial_date = |burial_place = |}} {{Nihongo|'''Princess Masako '''|昌子内親王|Masako Naishinnō|950 – 10 January, 1000}}, was a princess and an [[empress of Japan]] during the [[Heian period]].{{Cite web |title=昌子内親王 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%98%8C%E5%AD%90%E5%86%85%E8%A6%AA%E7%8E%8B-21005 |access-date=2024-06-02 |website=Asahi Dictionary of Historical Japanese Figures |publisher=Asahi Shimbun Publishing Co. |language=Japanese |via=Kotobank.jp}} She was the consort of her cousin [[Emperor Reizei]] of Japan. She was the daughter of [[Emperor Suzaku]] and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Empress dowager of Japan]] | after=Fujiwara no Chikako
(granted title posthumously) | years=973–986}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Junshi]] | years=986–1000}} {{s-end}} {{Consorts of Japan}} {{Empress dowagers of Japan}} {{Grand empress {{lang|ja|昌子内親王}} |succession = [[Empress consort of Japan]] |reign = October 9, 967 – August 1, 973 |succession1 = [[Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = 973–986 |succession2 = [[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] |reign2 = 986–1000 |consort = yes |spouse = [[Emperor Reizei]] |issue = |royal house = [[Imperial House of Japan]] |father = [[Emperor Suzaku]] |mother = Hiroko |birth_date = 950 |birth_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |death_date = {{death date and age|1000|1|10|950}} |death_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |burial_date = |burial_place = |}} {{Nihongo|'''Princess Masako '''|昌子内親王|Masako Naishinnō|950 – 10 January, 1000}}, was a princess and an [[empress of Japan]] during the [[Heian period]].{{Cite web |title=昌子内親王 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%98%8C%E5%AD%90%E5%86%85%E8%A6%AA%E7%8E%8B-21005 |access-date=2024-06-02 |website=Asahi Dictionary of Historical Japanese Figures |publisher=Asahi Shimbun Publishing Co. |language=Japanese |via=Kotobank.jp}} She was the consort of her cousin [[Emperor Reizei]] of Japan. She was the daughter of [[Emperor Suzaku]] and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Empress dowager of Japan]] | after=Fujiwara no Chikako
(granted title posthumously) | years=973–986}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Junshi]] | years=986–1000}} {{s-end}} {{Consorts of Japan}} {{Empress dowagers of Japan}} {{Grand empress dowagers of Japan}} [[category:Pages that used to use Authority control]][[en:Princess Masako (Reizei)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Masako, Princess}} [[category:kk]][[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia {{lang|ja|昌子内親王}} |succession = [[Empress consort of Japan]] |reign = October 9, 967 – August 1, 973 |succession1 = [[Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = 973–986 |succession2 = [[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] |reign2 = 986–1000 |consort = yes |spouse = [[Emperor Reizei]] |issue = |royal house = [[Imperial House of Japan]] |father = [[Emperor Suzaku]] |mother = Hiroko |birth_date = 950 |birth_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |death_date = {{death date and age|1000|1|10|950}} |death_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |burial_date = |burial_place = |}} {{Nihongo|'''Princess Masako '''|昌子内親王|Masako Naishinnō|950 – 10 January, 1000}}, was a princess and an [[empress of Japan]] during the [[Heian period]].{{Cite web |title=昌子内親王 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%98%8C%E5%AD%90%E5%86%85%E8%A6%AA%E7%8E%8B-21005 |access-date=2024-06-02 |website=Asahi Dictionary of Historical Japanese Figures |publisher=Asahi Shimbun Publishing Co. |language=Japanese |via=Kotobank.jp}} She was the consort of her cousin [[Emperor Reizei]] of Japan. She was the daughter of [[Emperor Suzaku]] and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]

{{lang|ja|昌子内親王}} |succession = [[Empress consort of Japan]] |reign = October 9, 967 – August 1, 973 |succession1 = [[Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = 973–986 |succession2 = [[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] |reign2 = 986–1000 |consort = yes |spouse = [[Emperor Reizei]] |issue = |royal house = [[Imperial House of Japan]] |father = [[Emperor Suzaku]] |mother = Hiroko |birth_date = 950 |birth_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |death_date = {{death date and age|1000|1|10|950}} |death_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |burial_date = |burial_place = |}} {{Nihongo|'''Princess Masako '''|昌子内親王|Masako Naishinnō|950 – 10 January, 1000}}, was a princess and an [[empress of Japan]] during the [[Heian period]].{{Cite web |title=昌子内親王 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%98%8C%E5%AD%90%E5%86%85%E8%A6%AA%E7%8E%8B-21005 |access-date=2024-06-02 |website=Asahi Dictionary of Historical Japanese Figures |publisher=Asahi Shimbun Publishing Co. |language=Japanese |via=Kotobank.jp}} She was the consort of her cousin [[Emperor Reizei]] of Japan. She was the daughter of [[Emperor Suzaku]] and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Empress dowager of Japan]] | after=Fujiwara no Chikako
(granted title posthumously) | years=973–986}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Junshi]] | years=986–1000}} {{s-end}} {{Consorts of Japan}} {{Empress dowagers of Japan}} {{Grand empress {{More citations needed|date=June 2024}}{{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|昌子内親王|date=November 2011}} {{Infobox royalty |name = Princess Masako
{{lang|ja|昌子内親王}} |succession = [[Empress consort of Japan]] |reign = October 9, 967 – August 1, 973 |succession1 = [[Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = 973–986 |succession2 = [[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] |reign2 = 986–1000 |consort = yes |spouse = [[Emperor Reizei]] |issue = |royal house = [[Imperial House of Japan]] |father = [[Emperor Suzaku]] |mother = Hiroko |birth_date = 950 |birth_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |death_date = {{death date and age|1000|1|10|950}} |death_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |burial_date = |burial_place = |}} {{Nihongo|'''Princess Masako '''|昌子内親王|Masako Naishinnō|950 – 10 January, 1000}}, was a princess and an [[empress of Japan]] during the [[Heian period]].{{Cite web |title=昌子内親王 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%98%8C%E5%AD%90%E5%86%85%E8%A6%AA%E7%8E%8B-21005 |access-date=2024-06-02 |website=Asahi Dictionary of Historical Japanese Figures |publisher=Asahi Shimbun Publishing Co. |language=Japanese |via=Kotobank.jp}} She was the consort of her cousin [[Emperor Reizei]] of Japan. She was the daughter of [[Emperor Suzaku]] and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Empress dowager of Japan]] | after=Fujiwara no Chikako
(granted title posthumously) | years=973–986}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Junshi]] | years=986–1000}} {{s-end}} {{Consorts of Japan}} {{Empress dowagers of Japan}} {{Grand empress {{More citations needed|date=June 2024}}{{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|昌子内親王|date=November 2011}} {{Infobox royalty |name = Princess Masako
{{lang|ja|昌子内親王}} |succession = [[Empress consort of Japan]] |reign = October 9, 967 – August 1, 973 |succession1 = [[Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = 973–986 |succession2 = [[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] |reign2 = 986–1000 |consort = yes |spouse = [[Emperor Reizei]] |issue = |royal house = [[Imperial House of Japan]] |father = [[Emperor Suzaku]] |mother = Hiroko |birth_date = 950 |birth_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |death_date = {{death date and age|1000|1|10|950}} |death_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |burial_date = |burial_place = |}} {{Nihongo|'''Princess Masako '''|昌子内親王|Masako Naishinnō|950 – 10 January, 1000}}, was a princess and an [[empress of Japan]] during the [[Heian period]].{{Cite web |title=昌子内親王 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%98%8C%E5%AD%90%E5%86%85%E8%A6%AA%E7%8E%8B-21005 |access-date=2024-06-02 |website=Asahi Dictionary of Historical Japanese Figures |publisher=Asahi Shimbun Publishing Co. |language=Japanese |via=Kotobank.jp}} She was the consort of her cousin [[Emperor Reizei]] of Japan. She was the daughter of [[Emperor Suzaku]] and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Empress dowager of Japan]] | after=Fujiwara no Chikako
(granted title posthumously) | years=973–986}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]

{{More citations needed|date=June 2024}}{{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|昌子内親王|date=November 2011}} {{Infobox royalty |name = Princess Masako
{{lang|ja|昌子内親王}} |succession = [[Empress consort of Japan]] |reign = October 9, 967 – August 1, 973 |succession1 = [[Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = 973–986 |succession2 = [[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] |reign2 = 986–1000 |consort = yes |spouse = [[Emperor Reizei]] |issue = |royal house = [[Imperial House of Japan]] |father = [[Emperor Suzaku]] |mother = Hiroko |birth_date = 950 |birth_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |death_date = {{death date and age|1000|1|10|950}} |death_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |burial_date = |burial_place = |}} {{Nihongo|'''Princess Masako '''|昌子内親王|Masako Naishinnō|950 – 10 January, 1000}}, was a princess and an [[empress of Japan]] during the [[Heian period]].{{Cite web |title=昌子内親王 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%98%8C%E5%AD%90%E5%86%85%E8%A6%AA%E7%8E%8B-21005 |access-date=2024-06-02 |website=Asahi Dictionary of Historical Japanese Figures |publisher=Asahi Shimbun Publishing Co. |language=Japanese |via=Kotobank.jp}} She was the consort of her cousin [[Emperor Reizei]] of Japan. She was the daughter of [[Emperor Suzaku]] and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]

{{lang|ja|昌子内親王}} |succession = [[Empress consort of Japan]] |reign = October 9, 967 – August 1, 973 |succession1 = [[Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = 973–986 |succession2 = [[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] |reign2 = 986–1000 |consort = yes |spouse = [[Emperor Reizei]] |issue = |royal house = [[Imperial House of Japan]] |father = [[Emperor Suzaku]] |mother = Hiroko |birth_date = 950 |birth_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |death_date = {{death date and age|1000|1|10|950}} |death_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |burial_date = |burial_place = |}} {{Nihongo|'''Princess Masako '''|昌子内親王|Masako Naishinnō|950 – 10 January, 1000}}, was a princess and an [[empress of Japan]] during the [[Heian period]].{{Cite web |title=昌子内親王 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%98%8C%E5%AD%90%E5%86%85%E8%A6%AA%E7%8E%8B-21005 |access-date=2024-06-02 |website=Asahi Dictionary of Historical Japanese Figures |publisher=Asahi Shimbun Publishing Co. |language=Japanese |via=Kotobank.jp}} She was the consort of her cousin [[Emperor Reizei]] of Japan. She was the daughter of [[Emperor Suzaku]] and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Empress dowager of Japan]] | after=Fujiwara no Chikako
(granted title posthumously) | years=973–986}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Junshi]] | years=986–1000}} {{s-end}} {{Consorts of Japan}} {{Empress dowagers of Japan}} {{Grand empress Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]

Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]

{{More citations needed|date=June 2024}}{{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|昌子内親王|date=November 2011}} {{Infobox royalty |name = Princess Masako
{{lang|ja|昌子内親王}} |succession = [[Empress consort of Japan]] |reign = October 9, 967 – August 1, 973 |succession1 = [[Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = 973–986 |succession2 = [[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] |reign2 = 986–1000 |consort = yes |spouse = [[Emperor Reizei]] |issue = |royal house = [[Imperial House of Japan]] |father = [[Emperor Suzaku]] |mother = Hiroko |birth_date = 950 |birth_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |death_date = {{death date and age|1000|1|10|950}} |death_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |burial_date = |burial_place = |}} {{Nihongo|'''Princess Masako '''|昌子内親王|Masako Naishinnō|950 – 10 January, 1000}}, was a princess and an [[empress of Japan]] during the [[Heian period]].{{Cite web |title=昌子内親王 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%98%8C%E5%AD%90%E5%86%85%E8%A6%AA%E7%8E%8B-21005 |access-date=2024-06-02 |website=Asahi Dictionary of Historical Japanese Figures |publisher=Asahi Shimbun Publishing Co. |language=Japanese |via=Kotobank.jp}} She was the consort of her cousin [[Emperor Reizei]] of Japan. She was the daughter of [[Emperor Suzaku]] and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Empress dowager of Japan]] | after=Fujiwara no Chikako
(granted title posthumously) | years=973–986}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]

{{More citations needed|date=June 2024}}{{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|昌子内親王|date=November 2011}} {{Infobox royalty |name = Princess Masako
{{lang|ja|昌子内親王}} |succession = [[Empress consort of Japan]] |reign = October 9, 967 – August 1, 973 |succession1 = [[Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = 973–986 |succession2 = [[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] |reign2 = 986–1000 |consort = yes |spouse = [[Emperor Reizei]] |issue = |royal house = [[Imperial House of Japan]] |father = [[Emperor Suzaku]] |mother = Hiroko |birth_date = 950 |birth_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |death_date = {{death date and age|1000|1|10|950}} |death_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |burial_date = |burial_place = |}} {{Nihongo|'''Princess Masako '''|昌子内親王|Masako Naishinnō|950 – 10 January, 1000}}, was a princess and an [[empress of Japan]] during the [[Heian period]].{{Cite web |title=昌子内親王 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%98%8C%E5%AD%90%E5%86%85%E8%A6%AA%E7%8E%8B-21005 |access-date=2024-06-02 |website=Asahi Dictionary of Historical Japanese Figures |publisher=Asahi Shimbun Publishing Co. |language=Japanese |via=Kotobank.jp}} She was the consort of her cousin [[Emperor Reizei]] of Japan. She was the daughter of [[Emperor Suzaku]] and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Empress dowager of Japan]] | after=Fujiwara no Chikako
(granted title posthumously) | years=973–986}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Junshi]] | years=986–1000}} {{s-end}} {{Consorts of Japan}} {{Empress dowagers of Japan}} {{Grand empress {{More citations needed|date=June 2024}}{{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|昌子内親王|date=November 2011}} {{Infobox royalty |name = Princess Masako
{{lang|ja|昌子内親王}} |succession = [[Empress consort of Japan]] |reign = October 9, 967 – August 1, 973 |succession1 = [[Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = 973–986 |succession2 = [[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] |reign2 = 986–1000 |consort = yes |spouse = [[Emperor Reizei]] |issue = |royal house = [[Imperial House of Japan]] |father = [[Emperor Suzaku]] |mother = Hiroko |birth_date = 950 |birth_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |death_date = {{death date and age|1000|1|10|950}} |death_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |burial_date = |burial_place = |}} {{Nihongo|'''Princess Masako '''|昌子内親王|Masako Naishinnō|950 – 10 January, 1000}}, was a princess and an [[empress of Japan]] during the [[Heian period]].{{Cite web |title=昌子内親王 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%98%8C%E5%AD%90%E5%86%85%E8%A6%AA%E7%8E%8B-21005 |access-date=2024-06-02 |website=Asahi Dictionary of Historical Japanese Figures |publisher=Asahi Shimbun Publishing Co. |language=Japanese |via=Kotobank.jp}} She was the consort of her cousin [[Emperor Reizei]] of Japan. She was the daughter of [[Emperor Suzaku]] and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]

{{More citations needed|date=June 2024}}{{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|昌子内親王|date=November 2011}} {{Infobox royalty |name = Princess Masako
{{lang|ja|昌子内親王}} |succession = [[Empress consort of Japan]] |reign = October 9, 967 – August 1, 973 |succession1 = [[Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = 973–986 |succession2 = [[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] |reign2 = 986–1000 |consort = yes |spouse = [[Emperor Reizei]] |issue = |royal house = [[Imperial House of Japan]] |father = [[Emperor Suzaku]] |mother = Hiroko |birth_date = 950 |birth_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |death_date = {{death date and age|1000|1|10|950}} |death_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |burial_date = |burial_place = |}} {{Nihongo|'''Princess Masako '''|昌子内親王|Masako Naishinnō|950 – 10 January, 1000}}, was a princess and an [[empress of Japan]] during the [[Heian period]].{{Cite web |title=昌子内親王 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%98%8C%E5%AD%90%E5%86%85%E8%A6%AA%E7%8E%8B-21005 |access-date=2024-06-02 |website=Asahi Dictionary of Historical Japanese Figures |publisher=Asahi Shimbun Publishing Co. |language=Japanese |via=Kotobank.jp}} She was the consort of her cousin [[Emperor Reizei]] of Japan. She was the daughter of [[Emperor Suzaku]] and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]

{{More citations needed|date=June 2024}}{{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|昌子内親王|date=November 2011}} {{Infobox royalty |name = Princess Masako
{{lang|ja|昌子内親王}} |succession = [[Empress consort of Japan]] |reign = October 9, 967 – August 1, 973 |succession1 = [[Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = 973–986 |succession2 = [[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] |reign2 = 986–1000 |consort = yes |spouse = [[Emperor Reizei]] |issue = |royal house = [[Imperial House of Japan]] |father = [[Emperor Suzaku]] |mother = Hiroko |birth_date = 950 |birth_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |death_date = {{death date and age|1000|1|10|950}} |death_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |burial_date = |burial_place = |}} {{Nihongo|'''Princess Masako '''|昌子内親王|Masako Naishinnō|950 – 10 January, 1000}}, was a princess and an [[empress of Japan]] during the [[Heian period]].{{Cite web |title=昌子内親王 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%98%8C%E5%AD%90%E5%86%85%E8%A6%AA%E7%8E%8B-21005 |access-date=2024-06-02 |website=Asahi Dictionary of Historical Japanese Figures |publisher=Asahi Shimbun Publishing Co. |language=Japanese |via=Kotobank.jp}} She was the consort of her cousin [[Emperor Reizei]] of Japan. She was the daughter of [[Emperor Suzaku]] and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Empress dowager of Japan]] | after=Fujiwara no Chikako
(granted title posthumously) | years=973–986}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Junshi]] | years=986–1000}} {{s-end}} {{Consorts of Japan}} {{Empress dowagers of Japan}} {{Grand empress dowagers of Japan}} [[Category:Pages that used to use Authority control]][[en:Princess Masako (Reizei)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Masako, Princess}} [[Category:kk]][[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia {{More citations needed|date=June 2024}}{{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|昌子内親王|date=November 2011}} {{Infobox royalty |name = Princess Masako
{{lang|ja|昌子内親王}} |succession = [[Empress consort of Japan]] |reign = October 9, 967 – August 1, 973 |succession1 = [[Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = 973–986 |succession2 = [[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] |reign2 = 986–1000 |consort = yes |spouse = [[Emperor Reizei]] |issue = |royal house = [[Imperial House of Japan]] |father = [[Emperor Suzaku]] |mother = Hiroko |birth_date = 950 |birth_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |death_date = {{death date and age|1000|1|10|950}} |death_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |burial_date = |burial_place = |}} {{Nihongo|'''Princess Masako '''|昌子内親王|Masako Naishinnō|950 – 10 January, 1000}}, was a princess and an [[empress of Japan]] during the [[Heian period]].{{Cite web |title=昌子内親王 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%98%8C%E5%AD%90%E5%86%85%E8%A6%AA%E7%8E%8B-21005 |access-date=2024-06-02 |website=Asahi Dictionary of Historical Japanese Figures |publisher=Asahi Shimbun Publishing Co. |language=Japanese |via=Kotobank.jp}} She was the consort of her cousin [[Emperor Reizei]] of Japan. She was the daughter of [[Emperor Suzaku]] and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Empress dowager of Japan]] | after=Fujiwara no Chikako
(granted title posthumously) | years=973–986}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Junshi]] | years=986–1000}} {{s-end}} {{Consorts of Japan}} {{Empress dowagers of Japan}} {{Grand empress {{More citations needed|date=June 2024}}{{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|昌子内親王|date=November 2011}} {{Infobox royalty |name = Princess Masako
{{lang|ja|昌子内親王}} |succession = [[Empress consort of Japan]] |reign = October 9, 967 – August 1, 973 |succession1 = [[Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = 973–986 |succession2 = [[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] |reign2 = 986–1000 |consort = yes |spouse = [[Emperor Reizei]] |issue = |royal house = [[Imperial House of Japan]] |father = [[Emperor Suzaku]] |mother = Hiroko |birth_date = 950 |birth_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |death_date = {{death date and age|1000|1|10|950}} |death_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |burial_date = |burial_place = |}} {{Nihongo|'''Princess Masako '''|昌子内親王|Masako Naishinnō|950 – 10 January, 1000}}, was a princess and an [[empress of Japan]] during the [[Heian period]].{{Cite web |title=昌子内親王 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%98%8C%E5%AD%90%E5%86%85%E8%A6%AA%E7%8E%8B-21005 |access-date=2024-06-02 |website=Asahi Dictionary of Historical Japanese Figures |publisher=Asahi Shimbun Publishing Co. |language=Japanese |via=Kotobank.jp}} She was the consort of her cousin [[Emperor Reizei]] of Japan. She was the daughter of [[Emperor Suzaku]] and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Empress dowager of Japan]] | after=Fujiwara no Chikako
(granted title posthumously) | years=973–986}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Junshi]] | years=986–1000}} {{s-end}} {{Consorts of Japan}} {{Empress dowagers of Japan}} {{Grand empress revision.text:
{{More citations needed|date=June 2024}}{{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|昌子内親王|date=November 2011}} {{Infobox royalty |name = Princess Masako
{{lang|ja|昌子内親王}} |succession = [[Empress consort of Japan]] |reign = October 9, 967 – August 1, 973 |succession1 = [[Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = 973–986 |succession2 = [[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] |reign2 = 986–1000 |consort = yes |spouse = [[Emperor Reizei]] |issue = |royal house = [[Imperial House of Japan]] |father = [[Emperor Suzaku]] |mother = Hiroko |birth_date = 950 |birth_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |death_date = {{death date and age|1000|1|10|950}} |death_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |burial_date = |burial_place = |}} {{Nihongo|'''Princess Masako '''|昌子内親王|Masako Naishinnō|950 – 10 January, 1000}}, was a princess and an [[empress of Japan]] during the [[Heian period]].{{Cite web |title=昌子内親王 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%98%8C%E5%AD%90%E5%86%85%E8%A6%AA%E7%8E%8B-21005 |access-date=2024-06-02 |website=Asahi Dictionary of Historical Japanese Figures |publisher=Asahi Shimbun Publishing Co. |language=Japanese |via=Kotobank.jp}} She was the consort of her cousin [[Emperor Reizei]] of Japan. She was the daughter of [[Emperor Suzaku]] and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Empress dowager of Japan]] | after=Fujiwara no Chikako
(granted title posthumously) | years=973–986}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Junshi]] | years=986–1000}} {{s-end}} {{Consorts of Japan}} {{Empress dowagers of Japan}} {{Grand empress dowagers of Japan}} {{Japan-royal-stub}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Pages that used to use Authority control]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 5]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category: 5]] [[Category:11 2]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Japanese empresses consort]] [[Category:Japanese Buddhists]] [[Category:10th-century Buddhist nuns]] [[Category:950 births]] [[Category:1000 deaths]] [[Category:People from Kyoto]] [[Category:Daughters of Japanese emperors]] [[Category:Completed pages from Wikipedia]] [[Category:mm]] [[Category:misc bump Category]] [[Category: 6]] [[Category:New]] }} [[en:Princess Masako (Reizei)]] [[sn:Princess Masako (Reizei)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Masako, Princess}}

{{lang|ja|昌子内親王}} |succession = [[Empress consort of Japan]] |reign = October 9, 967 – August 1, 973 |succession1 = [[Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = 973–986 |succession2 = [[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] |reign2 = 986–1000 |consort = yes |spouse = [[Emperor Reizei]] |issue = |royal house = [[Imperial House of Japan]] |father = [[Emperor Suzaku]] |mother = Hiroko |birth_date = 950 |birth_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |death_date = {{death date and age|1000|1|10|950}} |death_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |burial_date = |burial_place = |}} {{Nihongo|'''Princess Masako '''|昌子内親王|Masako Naishinnō|950 – 10 January, 1000}}, was a princess and an [[empress of Japan]] during the [[Heian period]].{{Cite web |title=昌子内親王 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%98%8C%E5%AD%90%E5%86%85%E8%A6%AA%E7%8E%8B-21005 |access-date=2024-06-02 |website=Asahi Dictionary of Historical Japanese Figures |publisher=Asahi Shimbun Publishing Co. |language=Japanese |via=Kotobank.jp}} She was the consort of her cousin [[Emperor Reizei]] of Japan. She was the daughter of [[Emperor Suzaku]] and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Empress dowager of Japan]] | after=Fujiwara no Chikako
(granted title posthumously) | years=973–986}} {{succession box | before= [[Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Junshi]] | years=986–1000}} {{s-end}} {{Consorts of Japan}} {{Empress dowagers of Japan}} {{Grand empress dowagers of Japan}} {{Japan-royal-stub}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Pages that used to use Authority control]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 5]] [[Category:Japanese empresses consort]] [[Category:Japanese Buddhists]] [[Category:10th-century Buddhist nuns]] [[Category:950 births]] [[Category:1000 deaths]] [[Category:People from Kyoto]] [[Category:Daughters of Japanese emperors]] [[Category:Completed pages from Wikipedia]] }} [[sn:Princess Masako (Reizei)]] [[en:Princess Masako (Reizei)]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] [[fa:شاهدخت ماساکو (ری‌زی)]] [[fr:Princesse Masako (Reizei)]] [[id:Putri Masako (Reizei)]] [[ja:昌子内親王]] [[sv:Masako (Reizei)]] [[th:เจ้าหญิงมาซาโกะ (จักรพรรดิเรเซ)]] [[zh:昌子內親王]]

{{More citations needed|date=June 2024}}{{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|昌子内親王|date=November 2011}} {{Infobox royalty |name = Princess Masako
{{lang|ja|昌子内親王}} |succession = [[Empress consort of Japan]] |reign = October 9, 967 – August 1, 973 |succession1 = [[Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = 973–986 |succession2 = [[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] |reign2 = 986–1000 |consort = yes |spouse = [[Emperor Reizei]] |issue = |royal house = [[Imperial House of Japan]] |father = [[Emperor Suzaku]] |mother = Hiroko |birth_date = 950 |birth_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |death_date = {{death date and age|1000|1|10|950}} |death_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |burial_date = |burial_place = |}} {{Nihongo|'''Princess Masako '''|昌子内親王|Masako Naishinnō|950 – 10 January, 1000}}, was a princess and an [[empress of Japan]] during the [[Heian period]].{{Cite web |title=昌子内親王 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%98%8C%E5%AD%90%E5%86%85%E8%A6%AA%E7%8E%8B-21005 |access-date=2024-06-02 |website=Asahi Dictionary of Historical Japanese Figures |publisher=Asahi Shimbun Publishing Co. |language=Japanese |via=Kotobank.jp}} She was the consort of her cousin [[Emperor Reizei]] of Japan. She was the daughter of [[Emperor Suzaku]] and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[:en:Fujiwara no Anshi|Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[:en:Fujiwara no Anshi|Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Empress dowager of Japan]] | after=Fujiwara no Chikako
(granted title posthumously) | years=973–986}} {{succession box | before= [[:en:Fujiwara no Anshi|Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[Grand empress dowager of Japan]] | after=[[:en:Fujiwara no Junshi|Fujiwara no Junshi]] | years=986–1000}} {{s-end}} {{Consorts of Japan}} {{Empress dowagers of Japan}} {{Grand empress dowagers of Japan}} {{Japan-royal-stub}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Japanese empresses consort]] [[Category:Japanese Buddhists]] [[Category:10th-century Buddhist nuns]] [[Category:950 births]] [[Category:1000 deaths]] [[Category:People from Kyoto]] [[Category:Daughters of Japanese emperors]] }} [[sn:Princess Masako (Reizei)]] [[en:Princess Masako (Reizei)]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] [[fa:شاهدخت ماساکو (ری‌زی)]] [[fr:Princesse Masako (Reizei)]] [[id:Putri Masako (Reizei)]] [[ja:昌子内親王]] [[sv:Masako (Reizei)]] [[th:เจ้าหญิงมาซาโกะ (จักรพรรดิเรเซ)]] [[zh:昌子內親王]] [[Category:Pages with valid en interwikis]] [[Category:pages with valid en interwikis 2]]

She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[:en:Emperor Murakami|Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She was the daughter of [[:en:Emperor Suzaku|Emperor Suzaku]] and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[:en:Emperor Murakami|Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[:en:Fujiwara no Anshi|Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[:en:Fujiwara no Anshi|Fujiwara no Anshi]]

She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[:en:Emperor Murakami|Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[:en:Fujiwara no Anshi|Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[:en:Fujiwara no Anshi|Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[:en:Empress dowager of Japan|Empress dowager of Japan]] | after=Fujiwara no Chikako
(granted title posthumously) | years=973–986}} {{succession box | before= [[:en:Fujiwara no Anshi|Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[:en:Grand empress dowager of Japan|Grand empress dowager of Japan]] | after=[[:en:Fujiwara no Junshi|Fujiwara no Junshi]] | years=986–1000}} {{s-end}} {{Consorts of Japan}} {{Empress dowagers of Japan}} {{Grand empress dowagers of Japan}} {{Japan-royal-stub}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Japanese empresses consort]] [[Category:Japanese Buddhists]] [[Category:10th-century Buddhist nuns]] [[Category:950 births]] [[Category:1000 deaths]] [[Category:People from Kyoto]] [[Category:Daughters of Japanese emperors]] }} [[en:Princess Masako (Reizei)]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] [[fa:شاهدخت ماساکو (ری‌زی)]] [[fr:Princesse Masako (Reizei)]] [[id:Putri Masako (Reizei)]] [[ja:昌子内親王]] [[sv:Masako (Reizei)]] [[th:เจ้าหญิงมาซาโกะ (จักรพรรดิเรเซ)]] [[zh:昌子內親王]] [[Category:pages with valid en interwikis 2]] {{wikidata link|Q7244748}}

[[en:Princess Masako (Reizei)]][[fa:شاهدخت ماساکو (ری‌زی)]][[fr:Princesse Masako (Reizei)]][[id:Putri Masako (Reizei)]][[ja:昌子内親王]][[ko:쇼시 내친왕 (950년)]][[sv:Masako (Reizei)]][[th:เจ้าหญิงมาซาโกะ (จักรพรรดิเรเซ)]][[zh:昌子內親王]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=0950|death_date={{death date|1000|1|10}}|gender={{ill|female|WD=Q6581072}}|nationality={{ill|Japan|WD=Q17}}|occupation={{ill|empress consort|WD=Q7723211}}|title={{ill|Empress of Japan|WD=Q595038}}|spouse={{ill|Emperor Reizei|WD=Q374125}}|father={{ill|Suzaku|WD=Q361019}}|mother={{ill|Hiroko-joō|WD=Q11567717}}|native_name=昌子内親王}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q7244748]] Wikidata name: Masako-naishinnō [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{More citations needed|date=June 2024}}{{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|昌子内親王|date=November 2011}} {{Infobox royalty |name = Princess Masako
{{lang|ja|昌子内親王}} |succession = [[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress of Japan]] |reign = October 9, 967 – August 1, 973 |succession1 = [[:en:Empress dowager of Japan|Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = 973–986 |succession2 = [[:en:Grand empress dowager of Japan|Grand empress dowager of Japan]] |reign2 = 986–1000 |consort = yes |spouse = [[:en:Emperor Reizei|Emperor Reizei]] |issue = |royal house = [[:en:Imperial House of Japan|Imperial House of Japan]] |father = [[:en:Emperor Suzaku|Emperor Suzaku]] |mother = Hiroko |birth_date = 950 |birth_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |death_date = {{death date and age|1000|1|10|950}} |death_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |burial_date = |burial_place = |}} {{Nihongo|'''Princess Masako '''|昌子内親王|Masako Naishinnō|950 – 10 January, 1000}}, was a princess and an [[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress of Japan]] during the [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]].{{Cite web |title=昌子内親王 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%98%8C%E5%AD%90%E5%86%85%E8%A6%AA%E7%8E%8B-21005 |access-date=2024-06-02 |website=Asahi Dictionary of Historical Japanese Figures |publisher=Asahi Shimbun Publishing Co. |language=Japanese |via=Kotobank.jp}} She was the consort of her cousin [[:en:Emperor Reizei|Emperor Reizei]] of Japan. She was the daughter of [[:en:Emperor Suzaku|Emperor Suzaku]] and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[:en:Emperor Murakami|Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[:en:Fujiwara no Anshi|Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[:en:Fujiwara no Anshi|Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[:en:Empress dowager of Japan|Empress dowager of Japan]] | after=Fujiwara no Chikako
(granted title posthumously) | years=973–986}} {{succession box | before= [[:en:Fujiwara no Anshi|Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[:en:Grand empress dowager of Japan|Grand empress dowager of Japan]] | after=[[:en:Fujiwara no Junshi|Fujiwara no Junshi]] | years=986–1000}} {{s-end}} {{Consorts of Japan}} {{Empress dowagers of Japan}} {{Grand empress dowagers of Japan}} {{Japan-royal-stub}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Japanese empresses consort]] [[Category:Japanese Buddhists]] [[Category:10th-century Buddhist nuns]] [[Category:950 births]] [[Category:1000 deaths]] [[Category:People from Kyoto]] [[Category:Daughters of Japanese emperors]] }} [[en:Princess Masako (Reizei)]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] [[fa:شاهدخت ماساکو (ری‌زی)]] [[fr:Princesse Masako (Reizei)]] [[id:Putri Masako (Reizei)]] [[ja:昌子内親王]] [[sv:Masako (Reizei)]] [[th:เจ้าหญิงมาซาโกะ (จักรพรรดิเรเซ)]] [[zh:昌子內親王]] {{wikidata link|Q7244748}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

{{lang|ja|昌子内親王}} |succession = [[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress of Japan]] |reign = October 9, 967 – August 1, 973 |succession1 = [[:en:Empress dowager of Japan|Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = 973–986 |succession2 = [[:en:Grand empress dowager of Japan|Grand empress dowager of Japan]] |reign2 = 986–1000 |consort = yes |spouse = [[:en:Emperor Reizei|Emperor Reizei]] |issue = |royal house = [[:en:Imperial House of Japan|Imperial House of Japan]] |father = [[:en:Emperor Suzaku|Emperor Suzaku]] |mother = Hiroko |birth_date = 950 |birth_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |death_date = {{death date and age|1000|1|10|950}} |death_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |burial_date = |burial_place = |}} {{Nihongo|'''Princess Masako '''|昌子内親王|Masako Naishinnō|950 – 10 January, 1000}}, was a princess and an [[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress of Japan]] during the [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]].{{Cite web |title=昌子内親王 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%98%8C%E5%AD%90%E5%86%85%E8%A6%AA%E7%8E%8B-21005 |access-date=2024-06-02 |website=Asahi Dictionary of Historical Japanese Figures |publisher=Asahi Shimbun Publishing Co. |language=Japanese |via=Kotobank.jp}} She was the consort of her cousin [[:en:Emperor Reizei|Emperor Reizei]] of Japan. She was the daughter of [[:en:Emperor Suzaku|Emperor Suzaku]] and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[:en:Emperor Murakami|Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[:en:Fujiwara no Anshi|Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[:en:Fujiwara no Anshi|Fujiwara no Anshi]]

[[en:Princess Masako (Reizei)]][[fa:شاهدخت ماساکو (ری‌زی)]][[fr:Princesse Masako (Reizei)]][[id:Putri Masako (Reizei)]][[ja:昌子内親王]][[ko:쇼시 내친왕 (950년)]][[sv:Masako (Reizei)]][[th:เจ้าหญิงมาซาโกะ (จักรพรรดิเรเซ)]][[zh:昌子內親王]] [[en:Princess Masako (Reizei)]][[fa:شاهدخت ماساکو (ری‌زی)]][[fr:Princesse Masako (Reizei)]][[id:Putri Masako (Reizei)]][[ja:昌子内親王]][[ko:쇼시 내친왕 (950년)]][[sv:Masako (Reizei)]][[th:เจ้าหญิงมาซาโกะ (จักรพรรดิเรเซ)]][[zh:昌子內親王]] [[en:Princess Masako (Reizei)]][[fa:شاهدخت ماساکو (ری‌زی)]][[fr:Princesse Masako (Reizei)]][[id:Putri Masako (Reizei)]][[ja:昌子内親王]][[ko:쇼시 내친왕 (950년)]][[sv:Masako (Reizei)]][[th:เจ้าหญิงมาซาโกะ (จักรพรรดิเรเซ)]][[zh:昌子內親王]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=0950|death_date={{death date|1000|1|10}}|gender={{ill|female|WD=Q6581072}}|nationality={{ill|Japan|WD=Q17}}|occupation={{ill|empress consort|WD=Q7723211}}|title={{ill|Empress of Japan|WD=Q595038}}|spouse={{ill|Emperor Reizei|WD=Q374125}}|father={{ill|Suzaku|WD=Q361019}}|mother={{ill|Hiroko-joō|WD=Q11567717}}|native_name=昌子内親王}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q7244748]] Wikidata name: Masako-naishinnō [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{More citations needed|date=June 2024}}{{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|昌子内親王|date=November 2011}} {{Infobox royalty |name = Princess Masako
{{lang|ja|昌子内親王}} |succession = [[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress of Japan]] |reign = October 9, 967 – August 1, 973 |succession1 = [[:en:Empress dowager of Japan|Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = 973–986 |succession2 = [[:en:Grand empress dowager of Japan|Grand empress dowager of Japan]] |reign2 = 986–1000 |consort = yes |spouse = [[:en:Emperor Reizei|Emperor Reizei]] |issue = |royal house = [[:en:Imperial House of Japan|Imperial House of Japan]] |father = [[:en:Emperor Suzaku|Emperor Suzaku]] |mother = Hiroko |birth_date = 950 |birth_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |death_date = {{death date and age|1000|1|10|950}} |death_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |burial_date = |burial_place = |}} {{Nihongo|'''Princess Masako '''|昌子内親王|Masako Naishinnō|950 – 10 January, 1000}}, was a princess and an [[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress of Japan]] during the [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]].{{Cite web |title=昌子内親王 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%98%8C%E5%AD%90%E5%86%85%E8%A6%AA%E7%8E%8B-21005 |access-date=2024-06-02 |website=Asahi Dictionary of Historical Japanese Figures |publisher=Asahi Shimbun Publishing Co. |language=Japanese |via=Kotobank.jp}} She was the consort of her cousin [[:en:Emperor Reizei|Emperor Reizei]] of Japan. She was the daughter of [[:en:Emperor Suzaku|Emperor Suzaku]] and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle [[:en:Emperor Murakami|Emperor Murakami]] due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[:en:Fujiwara no Anshi|Fujiwara no Anshi]] | title=[[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress of Japan]] | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= [[:en:Fujiwara no Anshi|Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[:en:Empress dowager of Japan|Empress dowager of Japan]] | after=Fujiwara no Chikako
(granted title posthumously) | years=973–986}} {{succession box | before= [[:en:Fujiwara no Anshi|Fujiwara no Anshi]]
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[:en:Grand empress dowager of Japan|Grand empress dowager of Japan]] | after=[[:en:Fujiwara no Junshi|Fujiwara no Junshi]] | years=986–1000}} {{s-end}} {{Consorts of Japan}} {{Empress dowagers of Japan}} {{Grand empress dowagers of Japan}} {{Japan-royal-stub}} {{draft categories| }} [[en:Princess Masako (Reizei)]] [[fa:شاهدخت ماساکو (ری‌زی)]] [[fr:Princesse Masako (Reizei)]] [[id:Putri Masako (Reizei)]] [[ja:昌子内親王]] [[sv:Masako (Reizei)]] [[th:เจ้าหญิงมาซาโกะ (จักรพรรดิเรเซ)]] [[zh:昌子內親王]] {{wikidata link|Q7244748}} [[Category:1000 deaths]] [[Category:10th-century Buddhist nuns]] [[Category:950 births]] [[Category:Daughters of Japanese emperors]] [[Category:Japanese Buddhists]] [[Category:Japanese empresses consort]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] [[Category:People from Kyoto]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

[[en:Princess Masako (Reizei)]][[fa:شاهدخت ماساکو (ری‌زی)]][[fr:Princesse Masako (Reizei)]][[id:Putri Masako (Reizei)]][[ja:昌子内親王]][[ko:쇼시 내친왕 (950년)]][[sv:Masako (Reizei)]][[th:เจ้าหญิงมาซาโกะ (จักรพรรดิเรเซ)]][[zh:昌子內親王]] [[en:Princess Masako (Reizei)]][[fa:شاهدخت ماساکو (ری‌زی)]][[fr:Princesse Masako (Reizei)]][[id:Putri Masako (Reizei)]][[ja:昌子内親王]][[ko:쇼시 내친왕 (950년)]][[sv:Masako (Reizei)]][[th:เจ้าหญิงมาซาโกะ (จักรพรรดิเรเซ)]][[zh:昌子內親王]] [[en:Princess Masako (Reizei)]][[fa:شاهدخت ماساکو (ری‌زی)]][[fr:Princesse Masako (Reizei)]][[id:Putri Masako (Reizei)]][[ja:昌子内親王]][[ko:쇼시 내친왕 (950년)]][[sv:Masako (Reizei)]][[th:เจ้าหญิงมาซาโกะ (จักรพรรดิเรเซ)]][[zh:昌子內親王]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=0950|death_date={{death date|1000|1|10}}|gender={{ill|female|WD=Q6581072}}|nationality={{ill|Japan|WD=Q17}}|occupation={{ill|empress consort|WD=Q7723211}}|title={{ill|Empress of Japan|WD=Q595038}}|spouse={{ill|Emperor Reizei|WD=Q374125}}|father={{ill|Suzaku|WD=Q361019}}|mother={{ill|Hiroko-joō|WD=Q11567717}}|native_name=昌子内親王}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q7244748]] Wikidata name: Masako-naishinnō [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{More citations needed|date=June 2024}}{{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|昌子内親王|date=November 2011}} {{Infobox royalty |name = Princess Masako
{{lang|ja|昌子内親王}} |succession = {{ill|Empress of Japan|en|Empress of Japan|WD=Q595038|lt=Empress of Japan}} |reign = October 9, 967 – August 1, 973 |succession1 = [[:en:Empress dowager of Japan|Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = 973–986 |succession2 = [[:en:Grand empress dowager of Japan|Grand empress dowager of Japan]] |reign2 = 986–1000 |consort = yes |spouse = {{ill|Emperor Reizei|en|Emperor Reizei|WD=Q374125|lt=Emperor Reizei}} |issue = |royal house = {{ill|Imperial House of Japan|en|Imperial House of Japan|WD=Q909452|lt=Imperial House of Japan}} |father = {{ill|Emperor Suzaku|en|Emperor Suzaku|WD=Q361019|lt=Emperor Suzaku}} |mother = Hiroko |birth_date = 950 |birth_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |death_date = {{death date and age|1000|1|10|950}} |death_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |burial_date = |burial_place = |}} {{Nihongo|'''Princess Masako '''|昌子内親王|Masako Naishinnō|950 – 10 January, 1000}}, was a princess and an {{ill|Empress of Japan|en|Empress of Japan|WD=Q595038|lt=Empress of Japan}} during the {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|WD=Q193292|lt=Heian period}}.{{Cite web |title=昌子内親王 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%98%8C%E5%AD%90%E5%86%85%E8%A6%AA%E7%8E%8B-21005 |access-date=2024-06-02 |website=Asahi Dictionary of Historical Japanese Figures |publisher=Asahi Shimbun Publishing Co. |language=Japanese |via=Kotobank.jp}} She was the consort of her cousin {{ill|Emperor Reizei|en|Emperor Reizei|WD=Q374125|lt=Emperor Reizei}} of Japan. She was the daughter of {{ill|Emperor Suzaku|en|Emperor Suzaku|WD=Q361019|lt=Emperor Suzaku}} and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle {{ill|Emperor Murakami|en|Emperor Murakami|WD=Q374015|lt=Emperor Murakami}} due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= {{ill|Fujiwara no Anshi|en|Fujiwara no Anshi|WD=Q1054488|lt=Fujiwara no Anshi}} | title={{ill|Empress of Japan|en|Empress of Japan|WD=Q595038|lt=Empress of Japan}} | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= {{ill|Fujiwara no Anshi|en|Fujiwara no Anshi|WD=Q1054488|lt=Fujiwara no Anshi}}
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[:en:Empress dowager of Japan|Empress dowager of Japan]] | after=Fujiwara no Chikako
(granted title posthumously) | years=973–986}} {{succession box | before= {{ill|Fujiwara no Anshi|en|Fujiwara no Anshi|WD=Q1054488|lt=Fujiwara no Anshi}}
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[:en:Grand empress dowager of Japan|Grand empress dowager of Japan]] | after={{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|en|Fujiwara no Junshi|WD=Q5507517|lt=Fujiwara no Junshi}} | years=986–1000}} {{s-end}} {{Consorts of Japan}} {{Empress dowagers of Japan}} {{Grand empress dowagers of Japan}} {{Japan-royal-stub}} [[en:Princess Masako (Reizei)]] [[fa:شاهدخت ماساکو (ری‌زی)]] [[fr:Princesse Masako (Reizei)]] [[id:Putri Masako (Reizei)]] [[ja:昌子内親王]] [[sv:Masako (Reizei)]] [[th:เจ้าหญิงมาซาโกะ (จักรพรรดิเรเซ)]] [[zh:昌子內親王]] {{wikidata link|Q7244748}} [[Category:1000 deaths]] [[Category:10th-century Buddhist nuns]] [[Category:950 births]] [[Category:Daughters of Japanese emperors]] [[Category:Japanese Buddhists]] [[Category:Japanese empresses consort]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] [[Category:People from Kyoto]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
