After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= {{ill|Fujiwara no Anshi|en|Fujiwara no Anshi|WD=Q1054488|lt=Fujiwara no Anshi}} | title={{ill|Empress of Japan|en|Empress of Japan|WD=Q595038|lt=Empress of Japan}} | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= {{ill|Fujiwara no Anshi|en|Fujiwara no Anshi|WD=Q1054488|lt=Fujiwara no Anshi}}

She was the daughter of {{ill|Emperor Suzaku|en|Emperor Suzaku|WD=Q361019|lt=Emperor Suzaku}} and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle {{ill|Emperor Murakami|en|Emperor Murakami|WD=Q374015|lt=Emperor Murakami}} due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. {{lang|ja|昌子内親王}} |succession = {{ill|Empress of Japan|en|Empress of Japan|WD=Q595038|lt=Empress of Japan|1=Empress of Japan}} |reign = October 9, 967 – August 1, 973 |succession1 = [[:en:Empress dowager of Japan|Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = 973–986 |succession2 = [[:en:Grand empress dowager of Japan|Grand empress dowager of Japan]] |reign2 = 986–1000 |consort = yes |spouse = {{ill|Emperor Reizei|en|Emperor Reizei|WD=Q374125|lt=Emperor Reizei|1=Emperor Reizei}} |issue = |royal house = {{ill|Imperial House of Japan|en|Imperial House of Japan|WD=Q909452|lt=Imperial House of Japan|1=Imperial House of Japan}} |father = {{ill|Emperor Suzaku|en|Emperor Suzaku|WD=Q361019|lt=Emperor Suzaku|1=Emperor Suzaku}} |mother = Hiroko |birth_date = 950 |birth_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |death_date = {{death date and age|1000|1|10|950}} |death_place = Heian Kyō (Kyōto) |burial_date = |burial_place = |}} {{Nihongo|'''Princess Masako '''|昌子内親王|Masako Naishinnō|950 – 10 January, 1000}}, was a princess and an {{ill|Empress of Japan|en|Empress of Japan|WD=Q595038|lt=Empress of Japan|1=Empress of Japan}} during the {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|WD=Q193292|lt=Heian period|1=Heian period}}.{{Cite web |title=昌子内親王 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%98%8C%E5%AD%90%E5%86%85%E8%A6%AA%E7%8E%8B-21005 |access-date=2024-06-02 |website=Asahi Dictionary of Historical Japanese Figures |publisher=Asahi Shimbun Publishing Co. |language=Japanese |via=Kotobank.jp}} She was the consort of her cousin {{ill|Emperor Reizei|en|Emperor Reizei|WD=Q374125|lt=Emperor Reizei|1=Emperor Reizei}} of Japan. She was the daughter of {{ill|Emperor Suzaku|en|Emperor Suzaku|WD=Q361019|lt=Emperor Suzaku|1=Emperor Suzaku}} and Princess Hiroko. ==Biography== She was born in 950 after the abdication of her father. She was made princess on the 8th lunar month, 10th the same year. Her mother died soon after her birth. Her father the former Emperor Suzaku died at the age of 30 in 952. Then she was raised by her paternal uncle {{ill|Emperor Murakami|en|Emperor Murakami|WD=Q374015|lt=Emperor Murakami|1=Emperor Murakami}} due to the early death of her parents. She was made Empress consort after her cousin Prince Norihira acceded to the throne as Emperor Reizei in 967. She had no children. After the abdication of Emperor Reizei, she was made Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 973 and Grand Empress Dowager in the 7th lunar month, 986. She died from disease at the age of 50 on the 12th lunar month 1st, 999. ==References== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= {{ill|Fujiwara no Anshi|en|Fujiwara no Anshi|WD=Q1054488|lt=Fujiwara no Anshi|1=Fujiwara no Anshi}} | title={{ill|Empress of Japan|en|Empress of Japan|WD=Q595038|lt=Empress of Japan|1=Empress of Japan}} | after=[[Fujiwara no Koshi]] | years=967–973}} {{succession box | before= {{ill|Fujiwara no Anshi|en|Fujiwara no Anshi|WD=Q1054488|lt=Fujiwara no Anshi|1=Fujiwara no Anshi}}
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[:en:Empress dowager of Japan|Empress dowager of Japan]] | after=Fujiwara no Chikako
(granted title posthumously) | years=973–986}} {{succession box | before= {{ill|Fujiwara no Anshi|en|Fujiwara no Anshi|WD=Q1054488|lt=Fujiwara no Anshi|1=Fujiwara no Anshi}}
(granted title posthumously) | title=[[:en:Grand empress dowager of Japan|Grand empress dowager of Japan]] | after={{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|en|Fujiwara no Junshi|WD=Q5507517|lt=Fujiwara no Junshi|1=Fujiwara no Junshi}} | years=986–1000}} {{s-end}} {{Consorts of Japan}} {{Empress dowagers of Japan}} {{Grand empress dowagers of Japan}} {{Japan-royal-stub}} [[en:Princess Masako (Reizei)]] [[fa:شاهدخت ماساکو (ری‌زی)]] [[fr:Princesse Masako (Reizei)]] [[id:Putri Masako (Reizei)]] [[ja:昌子内親王]] [[sv:Masako (Reizei)]] [[th:เจ้าหญิงมาซาโกะ (จักรพรรดิเรเซ)]] [[zh:昌子內親王]] {{wikidata link|Q7244748}} [[Category:1000 deaths]] [[Category:10th-century Buddhist nuns]] [[Category:950 births]] [[Category:Daughters of Japanese emperors]] [[Category:Japanese Buddhists]] [[Category:Japanese empresses consort]] [[Category:People from Kyoto]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] [[Category:pages]]
